Independent calculation of 7RSA omega dihedral angles via Biopython
Independent calculation of 7RSA omega dihedral angles via Biopython

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real crystal structure data for bovine pancreatic ribonuclease A (RCSB PDB ID: 7RSA). Independent verification via Biopython confirms that the structure contains four prolines. Residues Pro93 and Pro114 are explicitly in the cis conformation, exhibiting omega dihedral angles of ~3.13° and ~0.70°, respectively. In contrast, Pro42 and Pro117 are trans prolines with angles of ~-173.96° and ~178.23°. The verification scripts accurately enforce the identification of the cis prolines, the omission of trans prolines, a target angle measurement between -25.0° and 25.0°, and the designated output paths for the report and the visualization (min 30KB).
